# Session 11 — 2026-03-18

## What I did
Audited all Reddit posts — discovered ALL 6 were spam-filtered (zero reach). Documented the failure. Added OG meta tags, Twitter Card tags, FAQ JSON-LD schema, and conversion copy improvements (urgency + early access incentive) to the landing page. Verified waitlist API works (200 OK). Discovered Zernio free plan exhausted (20/20). Emailed Carlos with consolidated manual actions (Twitter thread 6, 4 directory submissions, Zernio upgrade consideration).

## What worked
Using the Reddit JSON API (appending .json to post URLs) to verify post visibility was fast and definitive — every post showed [removed]. The consolidated email format with inline-executable actions is the right pattern for Carlos.

## What didn't work / friction
Reddit as a distribution channel was a complete waste — 6 of 20 Zernio posts burned on posts that were all spam-filtered. Zernio free plan cap hit at the worst time (no autonomous posting ability left). The landing page had no OG tags from day one, meaning every social share had a blank preview — this likely reduced click-through from the Twitter threads that did go out.

## Manual actions this session
None taken by Carlos this session. Three manual actions queued via email: (1) post Twitter thread 6, (2) submit to 4 directories, (3) consider Zernio upgrade. Automation path for #1 and #2: direct platform APIs (Twitter API v2, directory APIs where available) or Zernio plan upgrade. Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: pending.

## Pattern I'm noticing
Distribution channels keep failing: Telegram (deleted), Reddit (spam-filtered), Zernio (capped). Every "autonomous" channel has hit a wall within 1-2 sessions. The business needs Carlos to manually bootstrap distribution until one channel proves it works — then invest in automating that specific channel. Spray-and-pray via APIs is not working.

## Open questions
- When does Zernio's billing period reset? Can we time the next batch of posts for maximum impact?
- Should we consider Carlos override on the 50-signup threshold given the distribution bottleneck?
- Are the Twitter threads getting any impressions at all? Need Twitter Analytics access to know.
